name: LPI Sandbox
description: Read-only knowledge server exposing the SMILE digital twin methodology (Sustainable Methodology for Impact Lifecycle Enablement). Provides methodology phases, implementation guidance, case studies, and best practices for building digital twins. Part of the LifeAtlas Life Programmable Interface.

skills.name: SMILE Methodology Overview
skills.description: Returns the complete SMILE framework: 6 phases, 3 perspectives, AI journey stages, and core principles.

skills.name: SMILE Phase Deep Dive
skills.description: Returns detailed information about a specific SMILE phase including activities, deliverables, duration, key questions, and related concepts.
examples: Tell me about the reality-emulation phase

skills.name: Knowledge Base Search
skills.description: Searches the LPI knowledge base for digital twin implementation knowledge, best practices, and methodology guidance across industries.
examples: What is explainable AI in digital twins?

skills.name: Case Study Browser
skills.description: Browse or search anonymized digital twin implementation case studies across industries including manufacturing, healthcare, energy, and smart buildings.
examples: Show me smart building case studies

skills.name: Implementation Advisor
skills.description: Returns scenario-specific digital twin implementation advice including SMILE phase recommendations and common pitfalls.
examples: I want to build a personal health digital twin
How should a manufacturing company start?

skills.name: Topic Browser
skills.description: Lists all available topics in the LPI knowledge base: SMILE phases, key concepts, perspectives, AI journey stages, and interoperability layers.

skills.name: Step-by-Step Guide
skills.description: Returns practical step-by-step implementation guidance for a specific SMILE phase.
